BulkDetails.Name: Structural Steel
BulkDetails.Description: Fatigue Data at zero mean stress comes from 1998 ASME BPV Code, Section 8, Div 2, Table 5-110.1

Term.Name: Low alloy steel, 4140, hardened & temper at 650°C
Term.Synonym: Grade J Class 110 to ASTM A372/A372M
Grade J Class 55 to ASTM A372/A372M
Grade J Class 65 to ASTM A372/A372M
Grade J Class 70 to ASTM A372/A372M

BulkDetails.Name: Low alloy steel, 4140, hardened & temper at 650°C
BulkDetails.Description:
Low alloy steel, AISI 4140, oil quenched & tempered at 650°C

Data compiled by Ansys Granta, incorporating various sources including JAHM and MagWeb.
ANSYS, Inc. provides no warranty for this data.

BulkDetails.Name: Cast iron, EN GJS 900 2
BulkDetails.Description:
Cast iron, nodular graphite, EN GJS 900 2, hardened & tempered, BS EN 1563:1997 (record based on BS 2789:1985 BS 900/2, hardened & tempered)

Data compiled by Ansys Granta, incorporating various sources including JAHM and MagWeb.
ANSYS, Inc. provides no warranty for this data.

Term.Name: Bronze, C52100, extra hard
Term.Synonym: Super X Phosphor Bronze Gr. C Alloy 113

BulkDetails.Name: Bronze, C52100, extra hard
BulkDetails.Description:
Bronze, CuSn8, C52100, extra hard (9% phosphor bronze), wrought

Data compiled by Ansys Granta, incorporating various sources including JAHM and MagWeb.
ANSYS, Inc. provides no warranty for this data.
